hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: At SustainSoft, we understand that trust is the foundation of every collaboration with foundations and NGOs. This policy details our dedication to protecting your strategic data.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content: SustainSoft ("we", "our" or "the Consultant") is committed to protecting the privacy of the foundations and non-profit entities we collaborate with. This Privacy Policy describes our practices regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of your information through our technology solutions.

sections.title: 2. Data Collected
sections.intro: To provide our technology consulting services effectively, we process the following categories of information:

items.text: **Institutional Information:** Foundation name, legal registrations, mission, and official contact data.
**Impact Metrics:** Aggregated data on beneficiaries and programs needed for software optimization.
**Technical Information:** IP addresses, access logs, and usage data of developed platforms.

sections.title: 3. Use of Information
sections.intro: We use the collected data strictly for the following purposes:

cards.title: Optimization
cards.desc: Improve the efficiency of the foundation's digital tools.

cards.title: Security
cards.desc: Detect and prevent fraudulent activities or unauthorized access.

cards.title: Support
cards.desc: Provide personalized technical assistance and issue resolution.

cards.title: Reports
cards.desc: Generate impact analysis for strategic decision-making.

sections.title: 4. Data Protection
sections.intro: We implement industrial-grade security measures to ensure the integrity of your information:

steps.title: End-to-End Encryption
steps.desc: All sensitive information is encrypted both in transit and at rest using AES-256 protocols.

steps.title: Strict Access Control
steps.desc: Only authorized personnel under rigorous confidentiality agreements have access to production environments.

steps.title: Periodic Audits
steps.desc: We conduct penetration tests and external security audits quarterly.

contact.title: 5. Your Rights
contact.subtitle: Questions about your privacy? Our Data Protection Officer is available to answer any questions or requests related to your rights (Access, Rectification, Cancellation, and Opposition).
